steps: File French tax reclaim using Form 5001 to recover EUR 3,744.00 overpaid withholding tax on TotalEnergies dividends
Submit proof of Norwegian tax residency and FR-NO treaty entitlement to 15% rate (vs. 30% standard rate applied)
Include BNP Paribas statement showing gross EUR 249,600 with EUR 33,696 tax withheld on 320,000 TTE shares
Reference FR-NO treaty Article 10 limiting dividend withholding to 15% for qualifying Norwegian residents

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
